title: Sky Battle
description: Climb through endless vertical battle zones. Hop platforms, stomp enemies, and ascend through procedurally-themed skies. Each level is a fresh challenge — volcano, ice palace, cloud kingdom, or anything you can name.
short_description: Vertical platformer climber. Stomp enemies, scale procedural battle zones, ascend forever.
controls_keyboard: Arrow keys or WASD to move. Up / W / Space to jump. Defeat enemies by jumping on them.
controls_gamepad: Left stick to move. A / South button to jump.
art_direction: Vertical portrait composition. A jet-pack-clad warrior figure rocketing STRAIGHT UPWARD through stacked cloud kingdoms, lightning storm zones, and floating crystal arenas — looking up the column from below. Bold vertical lines of motion, neon-magenta and electric-cyan rim light, layered cloud strata receding upward. Rocket exhaust trail straight down. Dramatic upshot perspective. Distinctly vertical, NOT a side-scrolling landscape.
